name: sushila
description: A full-stack e-commerce website for a sushi store. Built with the PERN stack (PostgreSQL, Express.js, React, Node.js).

scripts.dev-backend: npm run build-shared && cd backend && npx tsx watch --tsconfig ./tsconfig.json ./src/index.ts
scripts.build-backend: npm run build-shared && cd backend && npx tsc
scripts.prod-start-backend: npm run build-backend && npm run start-backend
